_comment: Canonical GitHub label set for rkt-bootstrapped projects. Read by scripts/sync-github-labels.sh and surfaced in skills (create-issue, implement, rkt-tailor). Edit here to add or rename a label; bootstrap and rkt-tailor sync this file onto each project's GitHub repo.

labels.name: Feature
labels.description: New functionality that doesn't exist yet

labels.name: Bug
labels.description: Something is broken or behaving incorrectly

labels.name: Docs
labels.description: Documentation, ADRs, dev logs, root meta files

labels.name: Backend
labels.description: FastAPI endpoints, business logic, rules engine, Python tests

labels.name: Database
labels.description: Supabase migrations, RLS policies, RPC functions, schema changes

labels.name: iOS
labels.description: SwiftUI views, view models, stores, models, navigation

labels.name: Web
labels.description: React pages, components, lib utilities, styles

labels.name: Blocked
labels.description: Cannot proceed until a dependency is resolved
